case_title: GERDA KIRCHER VS. PAULINE FRY et al

docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL ON AUG-26-2002 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON AUG-26-2002 BY ANNE E. BOULIANE. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED.
